name: Vegetable Pasta Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Garbanzo Beans, drained and rinsed
1/4 Teaspoon Dried Hot Red Chilies, crushed (or to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the onion and garlic in olive oil. Add the onion first; when it becomes slightly translucent, add the garlic. Cook for about 10 minutes.
2. Blend the garbanzo beans and tomatoes until finely chopped but not smooth.
3. Add all ingredients to the pot and simmer, uncovered, for 45 minutes to an hour, stirring occasionally.
4. This sauce pairs well with various pasta types.
